reviews.author: Scott Alan Hardy
reviews.text: The speed and quality was unbelievable. We waited a while to do this review because we wanted to make sure that everything settled down. We chose a light gray with specks and the impressive thing was how they went and did the steps and they went up the wall to the sheet rock. A few other bids were much more expensive and didn't include going up the wall or doing the step into the house. Highly recommend them.

reviews.author: Sophie Tsai
reviews.text: Jen and Stacey were amazing! Super friendly, punctual, and they got straight to work. The floors were already looking great the first night, and they came back the next day to finish the top coat. We couldn't be happier with how our epoxy floors turned out — it's a complete transformation. Their pricing is very competitive, and the lifetime warranty is such a bonus.

reviews.author: Jeanelle S
reviews.text: Highly recommend for your garage epoxy needs! Friendly crew and great quality work. After tons of research and crazy quotes up to $3–4k for a standard two-car garage, these guys were the most reasonably priced. They were quick to respond and scheduled the two-day job within a week. Our garage looks awesome!

reviews.author: Hebert Family
reviews.text: I absolutely LOVE our garage floors! Their crew was punctual, super friendly, communicated well and did a beautiful job. Their pricing was unbeatable and I am so happy with the final product!

reviews.author: Chris Kladouras
reviews.text: From the start, Mike and his team were very informative on the entire process. Communication was professional, work was precise, and in a timely manner. Would 100% use them again. No nonsense rock solid company.
